overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a female character walking through an ancient Egyptian desert village. The character traverses narrow stone pathways, passes through a market area, and ascends a sand dune to reveal a panoramic view of the oasis settlement with an obelisk and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village path between stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow village path flanked by stone walls and palm trees

notable_agents.action: villager in blue robe walking alongside the path
villager in striped tunic walking ahead on the right

entered.detail: tall white cylindrical tower with small windows visible above the stone wall
rough-hewn stone wall running alongside the path
tall date palm with green fronds casting shadows on the path
large reddish-brown rock formation emerging from the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed village path with stone walls on the left and rocky outcrops on the right. A tall white tower looms in the distance while palm trees provide sparse shade. Two villagers walk nearby, one on each side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village square with market stalls

events.description: exits narrow walled path into open village square with visible market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the open square passing by market stalls on the right

entered.detail: wooden market stall with orange fabric canopy and displayed goods
small stone building with flat roof on the left side
large sand dune rising in the background beyond the village

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a sunlit village square with sand-covered ground and visible tire tracks. A market stall with an orange canopy sits on the right while small stone buildings line the left. The character walks toward a large sand dune visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy village common area with children playing

events.description: character turns left toward a group of children and scattered chickens
chickens scatter and run as the character approaches the sandy play area

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking toward a group of children playing in the sand near stone ruins

notable_agents.action: children playing and sitting in the sand near palm trees
chickens running and scattering across the sandy ground

entered.detail: ancient crumbling stone structure with weathered blocks
tall white stone obelisk with hieroglyphic carvings visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a sandy common area where children play near ancient stone ruins. Chickens scatter across the sand as the character approaches. In the distance, a tall white obelisk becomes visible against the blue sky, marking the center of the village.

scene_state.functional_zone: sand dune slope overlooking the village

events.description: begins ascending the sand dune, changing elevation and perspective
view opens to reveal distant mountain range and expansive desert beyond the village

agents.ego_description: climbing up the sand dune with the village and obelisk visible below

entered.detail: rocky cliff faces and mountain peaks forming the horizon boundary
cluster of mud-brick houses and structures of the oasis settlement
rolling sand dunes extending into the desert wilderness

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep sand dune, with each step revealing more of the expansive landscape. The village buildings become visible below while distant mountains rise on the horizon. The obelisk grows larger in the frame as the elevation increases, and the desert dunes stretch out to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: sand dune crest with panoramic desert vista

events.description: reaches the crest of the dune and slows to walk along the ridge

agents.ego_description: walking along the dune ridge while observing the panoramic view of the desert and mountains

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face marking the edge of the desert plateau

segments.scene_description: At the top of the sand dune, the character walks along the ridge with the sun behind, casting long shadows. The view encompasses the vast desert wilderness, distant mountains, and the rocky cliffs to the right. The obelisk remains visible in the mid-distance, standing as a monument above the oasis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins within the confined corridors of an Egyptian village and ascends to a panoramic desert vista. It begins by following the character through a narrow path enclosed by stone walls and rocky outcrops, moving past villagers and sparse palm trees toward a distant white tower. As the path opens into a sunlit village square, the camera passes a market stall with an orange canopy before shifting left into a sandy common area where children play among ancient ruins and scattering chickens. The scene then transitions as the character climbs a steep sand dune, with the perspective gradually expanding to reveal the village buildings below and a tall white obelisk rising against the blue sky. Finally, the camera reaches the ridge of the dune, where the view opens fully to encompass the vast desert wilderness, distant mountains, and rocky cliffs under a sun that casts long shadows across the landscape.
